name: washerwoman-pond
description: Woman washing laundry by a lantern-lit courtyard pond at night.
source_artifacts: Visual inspection of frames 1, 12 and 24 found strong pre-existing bloom and clipped white edges around the dress, arms, lantern, cloth, wet stone and water reflections. Fine hair/hand geometry also changes in the source; those effects are not automatically warp halos or white-line regressions.
